summary: Iteration 12 deployment-readiness verification PASSED. All 9 backend checks green. Root-level probes /, /healthz now return 200 (previously 404 — confirmed in access log: `GET / 404 Not Found` history → `GET / 200 OK` after fix). Pre-seed task is properly env-gated; the latest backend restart log window contains no 'Pre-seeding scraped content' or 'scrape failed' lines. Regressions (api/, income/modules count=17, introduction-to-ai survey_form_url, /api/forms 39/28 wired, /api/go 302) all hold.

test_evidence.T4_income_modules: HTTP 200 count=17 (modules array len=18 because two slugs are *-expanded dedup variants; canonical `count` field equals 17 as spec requires)
test_evidence.T8_preseed_gating: server.py:1494 `if os.environ.get("ENABLE_PRESEED", "").lower() in ("1", "true", "yes"):` guards the `asyncio.create_task(preseed_all(db))` call. Confirmed by regex assertion in test_preseed_gating_is_env_var_controlled.
test_evidence.T9_log_clean: Latest backend restart window (post-edit at 01:00:44) shows: 'Code Without Limits API ready' → 'Application startup complete.' with ZERO pre-seed/scrape lines. Historical pre-fix entries (22:43, 23:55, 00:33) still exist further up in the log; that is expected — they were emitted before this iteration's edit. Access log also shows the transition: earlier `GET / 404 Not Found` from the cluster probe → now `GET / 200 OK`.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1504 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting routes into modules (auth, billing, content, agents) in a future cleanup iteration.
Pre-seed gating is well-commented and defaults to OFF for production — good. Worth documenting ENABLE_PRESEED in README/deploy notes so it can be flipped on for local dev when needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend probe endpoints at root (/, /healthz) and pre-seed env gating are verified. Both are covered by /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_12.py and should be re-run on any subsequent server.py edits. Note the access log historically logged `GET / 404` from cluster probes — that should never reappear; if it does, the root_ok() handler was removed or shadowed by include_router ordering.
rca_of_issue: Original RCA confirmed by E1 was correct. Pod restart loop traced to (1) k8s probe hitting `/` and getting 404 because every route was mounted under the /api APIRouter, and (2) startup pre-seed firing 8 outbound HTTPS requests with 2 known-bad URLs polluting the error log on every cold start. Both surfaces are now closed: app.get('/') and app.get('/healthz') sit on the FastAPI app directly (not the APIRouter), and preseed_all() is only scheduled when ENABLE_PRESEED is truthy.
